contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Contact form for team opportunities, technical collaborations or work proposals.

hero.label: Open to joining a team
hero.titleAccessible: I want to join a team and build something precise.
hero.description: I'm looking to join a team where I can translate complex requirements into clinical, high-performance interfaces. Reach out if you want to discuss a role or a concrete opportunity.

name.label: Full name
name.validation_min: Name must be at least 2 characters

subject.label: Subject
subject.validation_min: Subject must be at least 4 characters

message.label: Message
message.placeholder: Tell me about the team, the role and the project goals...
message.validation_min: Message must be at least 10 characters

status.success: Thanks — your message has been sent

errors.no_endpoint: No endpoint is configured to send messages.
errors.send_failed: Could not send the message. Please try again later.
